text.title: plg-metrics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for plg-metrics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Cohort tables displayed in dashboards with no action attached per cohort.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Retention diagnosis without root-cause analysis and an assigned experiment is theater. Each underperforming cohort needs a hypothesis and a next sprint action, not just a colored cell.

failure-mode.description: Agent proposes SQL aggregations on event tables without including a test query against a known sample.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs produce plausible-but-wrong SQL: UNION over UNION ALL, missed deduplication on user_id, off-by-one in window functions. Always require the agent to output both the SQL and a validation query.

failure-mode.description: Agent summarizes cohort retention as "retention improved" when M3 dropped 2 percentage points.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs rephrase directional changes to sound positive. Demand verbatim numbers in cohort summaries; no rounding, no rephrasing of direction.

failure-mode.description: Sending per-user event data (including emails, IPs, names) to an external LLM for analysis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Per-user event data must be aggregated before sending to any external model. Sanitize PII before any LLM call that processes analytics data.

failure-mode.description: Agent conflates "activation" with "onboarding completion" in cohort summaries.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Activation (reaching the aha moment) and onboarding completion (finishing the setup wizard) are different events with different causal relationships to retention. Confusion between them invalidates the analysis. Inject the glossary into every analytics prompt.

failure-mode.description: LLMs propose plausible-but-wrong SQL aggregations on event tables (UNION over UNION ALL, missed deduplication).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always require the agent to output the SQL and a test query against a known sample.

failure-mode.description: PQL weight proposals based on small samples overfit.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the agent to report sample size and confidence band. Reject proposals with sample under 200 converters + 200 churned trials.

failure-mode.description: Cohort summaries paraphrased by the agent often invert direction ("retention improved" when M3 dropped 2pp).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Demand verbatim numbers, no rounding, no directional paraphrase.

failure-mode.description: Anomaly detection without a baseline is hallucination.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provide last 8 weeks of values as context for any "anomaly" claim.

failure-mode.description: Privacy: per-user event data sent to an external LLM without aggregation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Per-user event data must be aggregated before sending to any external model. Sanitize emails, names, IPs.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a glossary into the prompt and reject if the agent uses the terms interchangeably.

failure-mode.description: Quarterly strategy outputs (freemium vs trial) shipped directly from agent recommendation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These are decision-grade outputs. Never ship the agent's recommendation without a human PM/CFO review.
